KOVANMOD-SCRY.description: Look at the top X cards of your draw pile. You may discard any of them.
KOVANMOD-SCRY.title: Scry
KOVANMOD-NAILS.description: When triggered deal damage equal to the amount on the target, and remove all the stacks. Each turn, Nails is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
KOVANMOD-NAILS.title: Nails
KOVANMOD-BARBED.description: This card deals [blue]2[/blue] additional damage and applies [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Nails[/gold].
KOVANMOD-BARBED.title: Barbed
KOVANMOD-EXPERTISE.description: This card [gold]Transforms[/gold] after being played 2 times.
KOVANMOD-EXPERTISE.title: Expertise
